tools.name: stf_sir_query
tools.description: Query a compiled ZMD artifact by token type, gloss pattern, semantic concept, or node depth. Returns matching ZTokens with full provenance (ztoken_id, artifact_sha256, source span).

artifact_path.description: Path to the compiled .zmd artifact file.

node_type.description: Filter by syntactic node type. Common values: 'heading', 'paragraph', 'list_item', 'block_quote', 'code_block'.

gloss_pattern.description: Substring or regex pattern to match against Σ.gloss (the semantic summary of the token).

concept.description: Filter tokens whose Σ.concepts array contains this value.

max_depth.description: Maximum syntactic depth to include (0 = root only).

max_results.description: Maximum number of matching tokens to return.

tools.name: stf_sir_diff
tools.description: Compute a semantic diff between two compiled ZMD artifacts. Returns added, removed, and modified ZTokens and relations, suitable for understanding document evolution.

artifact_path_a.description: Path to the baseline .zmd artifact (version A / before).

artifact_path_b.description: Path to the revised .zmd artifact (version B / after).

include_unchanged.description: If true, include unchanged tokens in the diff result.

diff_mode.description: Which dimensions to compare. 'semantic' compares Σ.gloss only; 'structural' compares node types and tree shape; 'full' compares all dimensions.

tools.name: stf_sir_retention
tools.description: Compute the retention score (ρ_v2) for a compiled ZMD artifact. Returns the full RetentionBaseline vector including semantic (ρ_Σ), structural (ρ_S), logical (ρ_Φ), and lexical (ρ_L) component scores.

artifact_path.description: Path to the compiled .zmd artifact file.

include_breakdown.description: If true, include per-token retention scores in addition to the aggregate vector.

threshold.description: Flag tokens whose retention score falls below this threshold (0.0–1.0).
